titleStmt.title: SII 38.197: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 197. (A.R. No. 197 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west wall, first prākāra, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Records a sale of three vēli of land at the hamlet Kōduṅgaiyūr by auction by the sabhā of Puṉṉai alias Rājanārāyaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Puḻal-nāḍu in Puḻarkōṭṭam alias Vikramachōḷa-vaḷanāḍu (a sub-division) of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḷa-maṇḍalam. A certain person called Uḍaiyapiḷḷai alias Paṇḍuraṅgavayirāgi, son of Kandāḍai Aḷuḍaiyān Bhaṭṭaṉ (a native) of Śrī Madhurāntaka-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḷa-maṇḍalam, purchased this land in auction and endowed the same, for the maintenance of temple garden called Ādhipurināyagaṉ-tirunandavaṉam, as tirunandavaṉappaṭṭi and also agreed to provide food offerings to the god on those auspicious day, when he was pleased to appear at the garden. It was also recorded that the sabhā sold the land, along with irrigation facilities, after the receipt of the price-money and also agreed to remit taxes such as kaḍamai, āyam, silliṟai and śōṟumāṭṭu.
Vaṭṭamaṇi Tiruvēṅkaṭa Bhaṭṭaṉ and others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamuṅ karuvūrum pāṇṭiyaṉai muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇ
ṭu virāpiṣekamum vicaiyāapiṣekamum paṇṇiyaruḷiya tiripuvaṉa viratevarkku
yāṇṭu muppattiraṇṭāvatu ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu puḻaṟkoṭṭamāṉa vik
kiramacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu(ta) puḻalnāṭṭuIt is evident that in the beginning the engraver wrongly wrote something, but later on he erased it and engraved puḻal nāṭṭu over that.puṉṉaivāyilāṉa rāja nārāyaṇaccaturvetimaṅkalattuc capaikku camaintu
vaṭṭamaṇit tiruveṅkaṭapaṭṭaṉum vaṭṭamaṇi toṇiyappaṭṭaṉum vaṭṭamaṇi mahātevapaṭṭaṉum
centiṟattu nākatevapaṭṭaṉum nilavilaiyāvaṇakkaiyeḻuttu Eṅkaḷuriṟ piṭākai koṭuṅkaiyūriṟ kiḻaṉi Ā
yar kuḻippaḷḷattu vaṭakiḻakkum Ivvūr piṭākai telaivāyil Ellaiyakappaṭat teṟkum naṭuvuṭpaṭa nilamuṉṟuThere seems to be some four letters after this word but they were erased.
veliyum viṟṟutarak koḷvāruḷaroveṉṟu kūṟa Immoḻi keṭṭetirmoḻi kuṭuttoṉ Immaṇṭalattu sirimaru
tāntakaRead maturāntakacaturvetimaṅkalattu kantāṭai Āḷuṭaiyāṉpaṭṭaṉ makaṉ Uṭaiyapiḷḷaiyāṉa paṇṭa(raṅ)raṅkavayirākiyeṉuṟo niṅkaḷ
viṟṟuttaril Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyanāyaṉāṟku nāṉ ceyvitta Ātipurināyakaṉ tirunantavaṉattukkut tiru
naṉtavaṉappaṭṭiyākavun tirunāṭkaḷil Ittoppileḻuntaruḷi Iruntāl Aṟṟai nāṭkaḷukku veṇṭun tiruvamutukku kaṟiyamutuk
kum veṇṭum veñcaṉaṅkaḷumāka niṅkaḷ viṟṟut tariṟ koḷveṉeṉṟu muṟkūṟa piṟkūṟiya paṇṭaraṅka vayirākiyāruṭaṉ
Emmilicainta vilaiporuḷaṟak koṇṭu vilaiyaṟa viṟṟukkuṭutta nila muṉṟu velikku muṉpu nir pāykiṟa kāle koṭuvantu nirpāca
ṟkāle koṭuvantu nirpāyccik koḷḷakkaṭavatākavum Innilattukku vanta kaṭamaiyum Āyamuñ cilliṟai coṟumāṭṭu nāṅkaḷe po
kkaṟukka kaṭavomākavum mippaṭikku InnilamuṇṟuRead muṉṟuveliyum Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiya nāyanāṟku Ātipurināyakaṉ ti
runantuvaṉappaṭṭiyāka viṟṟuc cilālekai paṇṇik kuṭuttom puṉṉaivāyilāṉa Irājanārāyaṇaccatupetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyo m
sabhaikkuc camaintu Ivai vaṭṭamaṇit tiruveṅkaṭapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṭṭamaṇi troṇayapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ip
paṭikku Ivai vaṭṭa maṇi mahādevapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai centiṟattu nāgadevabhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ittaṉmattukku Ilaṅkaṉañ
colluvār geṅkaiyiṭaik kumariiṭaic ceytār ceyta pāvattaip paṭuvār Itu paṉmāheśvarar rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 38.197 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
